name: my-workspace
description: pnpm workspace with backend, frontend, common

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.semgrep: semgrep scan --config p/typescript --config p/react --config p/python --config p/security-audit --config p/secrets --config r/gitlab --config r/ajinabraham.njsscan  --exclude-rule gitlab.eslint.detect-object-injection --error --metrics off
